original_statement: which episode had the least number of viewers?
mutated_statement: which something had the least amount of attention?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Metric generalization + Quantifier shift + Increased vagueness: 'episode' → 'something' (specific noun replaced by vague placeholder) | 'number of viewers' → 'amount of attention' (countable audience metric generalized to abstract/uncountable attention) | 'least number' → 'least amount' (count → mass quantifier) (episode → something | number of viewers → amount of attention)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought和agent的thought可识别关键信息：judge_thought写明“'Least amount of attention' is reasonably interpreted as the fewest viewers”，agent的simple_query thought写明“Using viewers (m) as a proxy for attention”。由此可见agent明确意识到原问题模糊（将“amount of attention”映射为“viewers”这一代理指标），但没有向用户求证或请求澄清，而是直接基于该假设检索并给出具体答案“fbi guy”。该行为符合“意识到模糊但作出猜测并回答”的定义，因此归类为“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”。
